title: Polar Fleece Fabric Anti-Pil Plain Colour Soft Warm Craft + Jumper Material (Metre 100cm x 150cm, Navy Blue)
features: Soft anti-pil Polar Fleece - perfect for warm soft jackets, jumper, blankets and cushions
description: Product description A soft anti-pill polar fleece perfect for warm and soft jackets, jumpers, blankets and cushions. Particularly nice for doggie coats and warm jumpers. This has a slight natural stretch in both directions, which is great for comfort purposes when using it to make fitted jumpers. Fleece is an easy care fabric that can be machine washed at 30 or 40 degrees. Please do NOT iron. 60"/ 150cm wide on the roll This fabric is sold per Half Metre and Metre Multiple purchases of the same item will ALWAYS be cut as one full length from the bolt and NOT as individual pieces. Legal Disclaimer Multiple purchases of the same item will ALWAYS be cut as one full length from the bolt and NOT as individual pieces. Whilst we try our best to photograph our products as accurately as possible, colours may vary depending on the monitor they are viewed on.
